name: frontend-ui-pipeline
description: Three-stage frontend redesign pipeline for premium UI briefs, production art assets, and real app implementation.

interface.shortDescription: Premium UI brief, asset, and frontend workflow.
interface.longDescription: A three-skill pipeline that turns an existing frontend flow into a premium custom UI concept, named production art assets, and a pixel-matched implementation in the real app.
defaultPrompt: Use the full frontend UI pipeline on this app flow.
